name: Project ARFC-88 Fluidic Computer Wafer Bill of Materials

computational_substrates_and_wafer_optic.specification: Diameter: 100mm, Thickness: 500 microns, Double-Side Polished, Z-Cut orientation, Surface Roughness Ra < 0.02 microns
computational_substrates_and_wafer_optic.purpose: Primary raw substrate for deep-reactive ion etching (DRIE) the logic channels of the ARFC-01 switch and ARFC-02 conjunction gates

computational_substrates_and_wafer_optic.specification: Certified ISO 10993 Long-Term Bio-Inert Matrix, Extruded Sheet, Thickness: 10mm
computational_substrates_and_wafer_optic.purpose: Precision CNC micro-machined to form the secondary non-conductive dielectric manifold backing plates and manifold interfaces

opto_electronic_telemetry_and_switching_.specification: Peak Wavelength: 940nm, Forward Current: 20mA, Radiant Intensity: 15mW/sr, Sub-miniature T-3/4 SMD Package
opto_electronic_telemetry_and_switching_.purpose: Populates the high-side transmitter array inside the ARFC-03 housing to project optical logic tracking beams across the quartz channels

opto_electronic_telemetry_and_switching_.specification: Collector-Emitter Voltage: 30V, Collector Current: 50mA, Rise/Fall Time: 1.5 microseconds, Matching SMD Package
opto_electronic_telemetry_and_switching_.purpose: Populates the low-side receiver array to translate the broken optical beam profiles into 3.3V DC digital logic changes

opto_electronic_telemetry_and_switching_.specification: Isolation Voltage: 2500V RMS, Common Mode Rejection: 15kV/microsecond, SOT-8 SMD Package
opto_electronic_telemetry_and_switching_.purpose: Provides complete opto-isolation buffering on the telemetry output lines to safeguard upstream tracking microcontrollers

solid_state_harvesting_and_hermetic_seal.specification: P-type and N-type Semiconductor Elements, Dimension: 1mm x 1mm x 1mm, Gold-Plated Copper Contacts
solid_state_harvesting_and_hermetic_seal.purpose: Arrayed concentrically along the outer protective housing boundaries to drive the 5.2 mW thermal flywheel loop

solid_state_harvesting_and_hermetic_seal.item: Piezoelectric PVDF High-Polymer Metallized Film Sheets
solid_state_harvesting_and_hermetic_seal.specification: Thickness: 28 microns, Poling Strain Vector d33: 33 pC/N, High-Temperature Metallized Contact Pads
solid_state_harvesting_and_hermetic_seal.purpose: Constructs the secondary acoustic noise recovery and dampening ring behind the monocrystalline quartz logic wafer layer

solid_state_harvesting_and_hermetic_seal.specification: Dielectric Strength: 250 kV/mm, Maximum Continuous Operating Temperature: 400C, Gas-Tight Hermetic Fluid Seal
solid_state_harvesting_and_hermetic_seal.purpose: Applied via cleanroom screen-printing to establish a leak-free bounding seal between the quartz wafer and the PEEK manifold plate
